text: BREAKING: IRGC Brig Gen Mousavi states 'Aerospace Force missiles and drones are locked on American targets in the region and aggressor enemy ships, awaiting the command to fire.' Most explicit direct threat to US forces since ceasefire began April 7.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Xinhua, Express Tribune, and Tribune India.

text: LEBANON ESCALATION: Israel killed 39 across southern Lebanon Saturday — deadliest day since April 17 ceasefire. IDF claims 100+ Hezbollah militants eliminated over weekend, 40+ infrastructure sites struck. Ceasefire effectively non-existent on Lebanon front. Total Lebanon death toll since March 2 now exceeds 2,800.
verificationNote: Euronews and JPost confirmed strike figures. Al Jazeera confirmed death toll.

text: MARITIME INCIDENT: UKMTO reports bulk carrier hit by 'unknown projectile' 23nm NE of Doha. Fire broke out, quickly controlled. No casualties. No claim of responsibility. Kuwait and UAE also intercepted Iranian drones this morning. Gulf shipping lanes remain extremely dangerous.
verificationNote: UKMTO official report. Confirmed by US News and Times of Israel.

text: ASSESSMENT: Israel's secret Iraq base (WSJ) reveals pre-war planning depth — SF/IAF logistics hub in Anbar province. IDF killed Iraqi soldier who nearly discovered it. Raises serious questions about Iraqi sovereignty and US role in facilitating Israeli operations on Iraqi soil.
verificationNote: WSJ exclusive confirmed by Haaretz and Israel Hayom.

text: DEAL STATUS: Iran FM spokesman says Tehran will respond to 14-point MOU 'at the appropriate time' — rejects deadlines. Rubio met Qatar PM + Witkoff in Miami. Iran's Khamenei adviser: Hormuz is 'capability equivalent to atomic bomb.' Formal talks May 14-15 still on track. No breakthrough imminent.
verificationNote: Fox News and Al Jazeera confirmed Iran FM statement. Axios confirmed Miami meeting.

text: HEZBOLLAH RETALIATION: Fired missiles at IDF base near Nahariya + drone swarm at another base. 3 IDF reservists wounded by explosive drones (1 seriously). Claims 22 attacks on Israeli forces Saturday. IDF: rockets intercepted or hit open areas. Tit-for-tat cycle accelerating.
verificationNote: Times of Israel and JPost confirmed IDF casualties. Asharq Al-Awsat confirmed Hezbollah claims.

text: OIL/ECONOMY: Brent $101, WTI $95.42. Gas $4.52 (AAA). Pentagon official war cost $25B; independent estimate $72B (Responsible Statecraft). Israel NIS 35B ($11.5B). Shell CEO: 'close to 1 billion barrels of crude shortage.' S&P 500 at record 7,365 despite war — markets pricing in deal.
verificationNote: Trading Economics, AAA, The Hill, CNBC confirmed figures.

text: US TANKER STRIKES: May 8 — US warships fired on and disabled Iranian tankers M/T Sevda + another evading blockade. Precision strikes on smokestacks. Live fire exchanged overnight. Trump: 'just a love tap.' UAE then reported new missile/drone attack from Iran — first since April ceasefire.
verificationNote: PBS, NPR, Washington Post confirmed tanker strikes. Al Jazeera confirmed UAE attack.
